transcript: Tommy was a good man He was kind Selfless When I first met Tommy, he was lost, looking for purpose. I'll never forget the day he joined our family. I had very high hopes for Tommy. The times of revelation are upon us. There's no room for sin in our family. Today we return Tommy to the dust from whence he came. May God have mercy on his soul.
